title: Mugamariyaan
desc: A serial killer commits a series of murders and then steals the hearts of the victims. However, when five college girls get trapped in his hands, it is up to them to decide how to escape alive.

title: AGP
desc: When a person loses her entire family to an accident, it leads her to a disorder along with hallucination and depression.

title: Vaanatha Pola
desc: Vellaichaamy sacrifices love for his three brothers, resisting marriage when he discovers his beloved intends to separate them.

title: Savarikkadu
desc: A group of friends decide to travel to Savarikkadu despite learning about the mysteries surrounding the place. Later, they get lost in the forest and try to find each other.

title: Pakka
desc: Nadiya tries to kill herself when she is separated from Pandi, her lover. However, when a lookalike of Pandi saves her, she is shocked to learn that he is not the man she loves.

title: Pandiya Naadu
desc: Shiva's perfect life turns upside down after his brother is killed by a dreaded gangster. Bent on revenge, Shiva turns into a ruthless killer and vows to eliminate his brother's killers.

title: Ashoka
desc: A master plan is hatched to assassinate the nation's prime minister. Then, an honest commando, Ashoka, makes it his mission to save and protect him at all costs.

title: Naam
desc: A dreaded terrorist's attempt at fleeing the country forever is foiled by the police and his brother is killed in the shootout. He then employs four out-of-work youths to hijack a plane.

title: Devi
desc: Devi, a Nagini from the Nagaloka, performs a special pooja on an eclipse day but is distracted by Tantra, an evil Naga punished by Nagdeva.

title: I Love You Da
desc: A match fixer faces tough competition when a young player decides to fight him and make his country win.

title: Varalaru
desc: Shivshankar, a person who uses a wheelchair, tries to make his son, Vishnu, aware of his responsibilities but to no avail. Things take a turn for the worse after Vishnu tries to rape a girl.

title: Thiraipada Nagaram
desc: Youngsters in Chennai seek film industry opportunities, renting a supportive house and receiving recommendations from a film production manager, but face disagreements.

title: Semma Botha Aagathey
desc: Chellam, a boy from a poor family, is in love with a rich girl but ignores her by focusing on his career while making his parents proud by scoring the highest in the district.

title: Ettuthikkum Para
desc: When a social activist locks horns with the government, it leads to the death of his son and his friends. Later, he protects an eloped couple who are hunted by their casteist relatives.

title: Iniyavaley
desc: Prabhakar is firm on marrying only after he clears his exams and becomes a collector. When his parents fix his marriage, his protests lead to complications and he ends up marrying the bride's sister.

title: Amma Appa Cheliam
desc: Chellam, a boy from a poor family, is in love with a rich girl but ignores her by focusing on his career while making his parents proud by scoring the highest in the district.

title: Cheran Chozhan Pandian
desc: After being released from jail Cheran, Chozhan, and Pandian are determined to reform, they encounter the corrupt politician Swamy. They befriend Gayathri, Swamy's sister, leading to complications.
